mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement: Where your sense of entitlement is our top priority!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, get this-I was at the Bank of Entitlement the other day, demanding my rightful VIP treatment as the CEO, of course. I waltzed in, exuding confidence and expecting red carpets to be rolled out. But lo and behold, they had the audacity to ask me to wait in line like a regular person! Can you even imagine? Me, Hot Josh, waiting among the common folk? I was positively scandalized. But fear not, dear reader, for I unleashed the ultimate entitlement fury. I demanded to see the manager, who promptly apologized and vowed to make amends. And make amends they did! I was whisked away to a private office, offered gourmet snacks, and given a personal concierge to attend to my every whim. The Bank of Entitlement truly knows how to treat their VIPs. And that, my friends, is how you assert your rightful place at the top.
